blocks.body: Zero article (zero article) is the absence of an article before a noun. In the English language, there are many cases when the article is not needed: with abstract concepts, common names, proper names, plurals in the general sense and in regular expressions.

{ "title": "11. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Abstract concepts in general - without article: Love, happiness, freedom.", "Plural in general - without article: Dogs are loyal, books are expensive. Maria, Mr. Smith.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Stable expressions: at home, by car, have breakfast, go to bed.", "Sports and languages: play football, speak English.", "Days, months, holidays: Monday, January, Christmas." ] }
